name: Norton AntiVirus, Privacy, Identity, & Advanced Scam Protection

keyFeatures.zh: 针对高级威胁的先进技术

description.en: Includes all features, 100GB cloud storage, and 2 devices protection.
description.zh: 包含所有功能，100GB云端存储和2台设备保护

description.en: Includes basic features, 25GB cloud storage, and 1 device protection.
description.zh: 包含基本功能，25GB云端存储和1台设备保护

weaknesses.en: No detailed information on commercial use
weaknesses.zh: 关于商业使用的信息不详细

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses looking for comprehensive protection against viruses, identity theft, and online scams.
targetAudience.zh: 寻求全面防护以抵御病毒、身份盗窃和网络欺诈的个人和小型企业

positioning.en: Norton positions itself as a trusted brand offering robust protection against a wide range of digital threats.
positioning.zh: 诺顿定位自己为一个值得信赖的品牌，提供针对广泛数字威胁的强大保护
